_README: Copy this file to 'config.local.json' (git-ignored) and fill in your REAL values. Never commit real IPs/tokens/passwords. Leave any GA you do not want to test as an empty string.

knx._note_hostProtocol: TunnelUDP (IP tunneling), TunnelTCP (secure), or Multicast (IP routing, ipAddr 224.0.23.12)

matter._note: userDir = your REAL Node-RED userDir: the commissioned Matter fabric lives in <userDir>/knxultimatestorage/matter. instanceId is auto-detected when empty. nodeId = the commissioned node id (run 'npm run avviaquesto-itest:matterlight -- --list'). IMPORTANT: your Node-RED must be STOPPED while the matter tests run (one active controller per fabric).

nodered._note: Used by avviaquesto-itest:nodered-knx: a private Node-RED instance is spawned on this port; connectWaitMs is the grace time for KNX+Hue to connect before commands.
